overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a red coat and hat exploring the interior of a rustic wooden cabin. The character walks around the single-room dwelling, examining the fireplace, furniture, and bed while natural light filters through the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cabin living area with stone fireplace

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the cabin interior, observing the stone fireplace and wooden furniture while moving toward the right side of the room

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with brick mantel holding various bottles and items
tall wooden cabinet with shelves next to the fireplace
weathered wooden plank door with small window slats at the top
lantern hanging from the ceiling beam near the door
window with beige curtains allowing natural light into the cabin
low wooden dresser with various items on top against the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a rustic wooden cabin near a stone fireplace on the left. The room features weathered wooden plank walls, a tall cabinet, and a wooden door with a small window at the far end. Natural light filters through the curtained window as the character begins to explore the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: cabin sleeping area with bed and exposed stone wall

events.description: camera pans right revealing the bed and stone wall section of the cabin

agents.ego_description: moving toward the bed and stone wall on the right side, then turning back toward the center and door

entered.detail: wooden bed frame with messy green sheets and pillows
section of exposed stone wall behind the bed
wooden barrel next to the bed
wooden ladder leaning against the wall near the dresser

segments.scene_description: The character moves to the right side of the cabin revealing a bed with green sheets against an exposed stone wall. A wooden barrel and ladder are visible near the dresser. The character then turns back toward the center, bringing the wooden door back into view from a new angle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic wooden cabin, shifting from a focus on the hearth to the living quarters. It begins near a stone fireplace on the left, where natural light filters through curtained windows against weathered wooden plank walls. As the character explores the space, the camera glides to the right to reveal a bed with green sheets set against an exposed stone wall, passing a wooden barrel and ladder. The scene then shifts back toward the center of the room, bringing the distant wooden door and its small window back into view from a new angle.
